microsoftSourceClaims.claimText: Microsoft Learn documents Restricted SharePoint Search as retiring and states that new enablement is blocked starting 2026-07-31.
Microsoft Learn positions Restricted Content Discovery as the current per-site SharePoint discoverability control that does not change permissions and may suppress AI entry points.
Microsoft Learn prerequisites for SharePoint Advanced Management describe role and licensing expectations, including the documented Microsoft 365 E7 entitlement path where available.
Microsoft Graph v1.0 documents the driveItem extractSensitivityLabels action and expected read-only extraction behavior for supported files.
Microsoft Learn documentation for DSPM for AI indicates the classic assessment experience has been replaced, so references to classic behavior must be treated as lifecycle-deprecated guidance.

licenses: Microsoft 365 base subscription plus one documented entitlement path (Microsoft 365 Copilot, SharePoint Advanced Management Plan 1, or Microsoft 365 E7 where available)
features: Restricted Content Discovery available for planning
Microsoft Purview audit logging enabled for discoverability traceability
capacityRequirements: One US commercial test tenant with read-only lab operator access
Upstream solution 01 baseline artifacts present under solutions/01-copilot-readiness-scanner/artifacts
dataRequirements: Representative sample data only; no production customer data in repository runs
prerequisites.notes: If upstream solution 01 artifacts are absent, Deploy-Solution.ps1 -WhatIf is expected to return a preview-blocked dependency status and non-WhatIf deployment remains blocked.

steps.intent: Review SharePoint sharing posture in read-only mode before running sample monitoring.
steps.expected: Current sharing posture is documented for later risk comparison without tenant changes.

readBack.expectation: Operator captures current sharing posture with no settings changed.

steps.intent: Review Restricted Content Discovery availability and management ownership in SharePoint admin center.
steps.expected: RCD availability is documented as planning evidence only.
steps.locator: SharePoint admin center > Policies > Restricted Content Discovery

readBack.expectation: Operator records whether RCD is available without changing site state.

steps.intent: Run Deploy-Solution.ps1 in detect-only WhatIf mode to capture dependency and discoverability planning state.
steps.expected: Deployment preview reports dependency status and records RSS legacy guidance plus RCD planning state without tenant writes.

readBack.expectation: Output shows dependency status (validated or preview-blocked) and no manifest write action.

steps.intent: Run Monitor-Compliance.ps1 in sample mode for read-only detect-only evidence generation.
steps.expected: Monitoring output contains representative findings and sample label coverage for scoped workloads.

readBack.expectation: Summary confirms read-only representative output and records sensitivity label coverage for supplied scanned sites.

steps.intent: Run Export-Evidence.ps1 with the runtime tenant placeholder to produce schema-aligned sample evidence.
steps.expected: Evidence package is generated with package-relative artifact paths and absolute returned PackagePath.

readBack.expectation: Package validates and includes owner-attestation records when regulated tier requires them.

steps.intent: Use a safe read-only Microsoft Graph endpoint to validate API reachability assumptions for lab notes.
steps.expected: Endpoint is reachable when consent exists; otherwise the run is recorded as BLOCKED with source evidence.

readBack.reference: Read-only Graph response or blocked error record
readBack.expectation: Evidence captures either successful read-only response or explicit blocked reason.

steps.intent: Confirm all Microsoft source claims remain published and lifecycle-aligned on review date.
steps.expected: Claim lifecycle states and notes remain consistent with cited Microsoft sources.
steps.operatorNote: Capture source validation notes and include retirement/deprecated markers where applicable.

readBack.expectation: Each claim has verification evidence dated on or before reviewedOn.

steps.intent: Record cleanup attestation that the run was read-only with no tenant mutations.
steps.expected: Cleanup attestation confirms no mutation steps were executed.
steps.operatorNote: No tenant writes were executed; contract uses mutations: [] and mutationRef: null for all steps.

readBack.expectation: Attestation confirms no mutable actions occurred and no cleanup runbook actions were required.

requiredArtifacts.description: SharePoint sharing posture screenshot captured during setup.
Restricted Content Discovery availability screenshot from SharePoint admin center.
Deploy-Solution.ps1 preview transcript showing dependency and discoverability states.
Microsoft source verification records for retirement, RCD, SAM, Graph, and DSPM claims.
No-mutation cleanup attestation signed by the lab operator.
